mapper.select: SELECT * FROM middleware_commands WHERE software_type_id = #{softwareTypeId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
SELECT * FROM middleware_commands ORDER BY software_type_id ASC, sort_order ASC
SELECT mc.* FROM middleware_commands mc INNER JOIN software_types st ON mc.software_type_id = st.id WHERE st.category = #{category} ORDER BY mc.software_type_id ASC, mc.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO middleware_commands (software_type_id, name, command, command_format, brief_description, detailed_description, categories, sort_order) VALUES (#{softwareTypeId}, #{name}, #{command}, #{commandFormat}, #{briefDescription}, #{detailedDescription}, #{categories}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE middleware_commands SET software_type_id=#{softwareTypeId}, name=#{name}, command=#{command}, command_format=#{commandFormat}, brief_description=#{briefDescription}, detailed_description=#{detailedDescription}, categories=#{categories}, sort_order=#{sortOrder} WHERE id=#{id}
